director.tagline_zh: 遊戲廣告 × 商業影像導演，紮根台灣
director.tagline_en: Game Ad & Commercial Film Director — Based in Taiwan
director.bio_zh: 鄭又勛（York）是台灣的遊戲廣告與商業影像導演，同時是曜境影像製作工作室創辦人。9 年來執導超過 88 個案子、產出逾 1000 支影音交付物，客戶橫跨 Schick舒適牌、王品集團、GODIVA、Google Play、茶裏王等消費品牌，以及斗羅大陸、天龍八部2、新仙俠：起源、失落的方舟等國際知名遊戲 IP。作品類型橫跨真人實拍、CG特效到AI生成影像等多元技術路線，從創意腳本、拍攝執行到後期製作皆一手包辦。
director.bio_en: York Cheng is a Taiwan-based director specializing in game advertising and commercial film, and the founder of Yao Jing Image Production Studio (registered in Taiwan). Over 9 years, he has directed 88+ projects and delivered 1,000+ final video assets for clients spanning consumer brands — Schick, Wang Steak Group, GODIVA, Google Play, and Tea's Tea — alongside internationally recognized game IPs including Soul Land, Tian Long Ba Bu 2, Xin Xianxia: Qiyuan, and Lost Ark. His work spans live-action production, CG effects, and AI-generated imagery, with hands-on involvement from creative scripting and production through post.

works.title_zh: 舒適牌 Schick HydroPRO 磁浮刮鬍刀 OTV
works.desc_zh: 為國際刮鬍刀品牌 Schick 執導的電視廣告，完整走過腳本、PPM、定裝到拍攝的商業製作流程。
works.desc_en: A commercial TVC for international razor brand Schick, taken through the full production pipeline from script and PPM to costume fitting and shoot.
works.concept_zh: 這支的主角其實是人，不是刀——只是產品的戲份很重。開場先讓刀身在純黑舞台上自己立著、慢慢轉，把東西看清楚；真正的重點是那個男人拿刀貼上臉頰、刮下去的那一下，刀身周圍亮起一圈藍光，把「磁浮」這種看不見的科技變成你看得見的東西。鏡頭再推近到皮膚，刀鋒劃過的地方拖出一道藍色的光。中間穿插水絲沖過刀刃、「91%」的字卡，最後收在他側光下那個滿意的半笑。所有的懸浮和光，都是在襯他，不是搶他。
works.concept_en: The real lead here is the man, not the razor — the product just gets a lot of screen time. It opens by letting the blade stand and slowly turn on a pure black stage, so you get a clean look at it; but the moment that matters is the man bringing the razor to his cheek and taking the first stroke, a ring of blue light lighting up around the blade — that's how the invisible "magnetic levitation" tech becomes something you can actually see. The camera pushes in to skin level, and the blade drags a trail of blue light where it passes. Water threading over the blades and a "91%" caption fill the gaps, and it closes on his satisfied half-smile under side light. All the floating and the glow is there to frame him, not upstage him.

works.desc_zh: 為知名飲料品牌茶裏王執導《客棧圍攻篇》，官方頻道累積近 200 萬觀看。
works.desc_en: Directed "Inn Siege," a spot for popular tea brand Tea's Tea that has drawn nearly 2 million views on its official channel.
works.concept_zh: 整支片都在裝成一場武俠打鬥，就為了在最後一刻拆穿它。茶客棧裡，光頭反派撂下一句「你今天插翅也難飛」，喝令「都進來」，一群拿刀的人從四面把桌邊的白衣主角圍住——鏡頭、構圖全是要開打的樣子。主角只是看了一圈說「人這麼多」，再問一句「夠嗎」。你以為他在問打不打得過，反派卻放下該有的殺氣，舉起一大瓶茶喝了一口：「有大瓶的當然夠。」原來這群人不是來打架，是來一起喝茶的。片子收在「歡聚一起乾 大瓶超回甘」和兩瓶 1250ml 上。
works.concept_en: The whole spot pretends to be a wuxia fight, just so it can pull the rug out at the last second. In a teahouse, a bald villain drops the line "there's no escaping today," orders "everyone, get in," and a crowd of armed men close in around the white-robed hero at his table — every angle says a brawl is about to start. The hero just looks around, says "that's a lot of people," and asks, "is that enough?" You think he's asking whether he can take them all — but the villain lets the menace go, lifts a big bottle of tea and takes a swig: "with the big bottle, of course it's enough." Turns out the crowd didn't come to fight, they came to drink tea together. It lands on "gather and drink up, the big bottle keeps its aftertaste," over the two 1250ml bottles.

works.title_zh: Google Play 台灣廣告《就差一點》
works.desc_zh: 為 Google Play 台灣執導的品牌廣告《就差一點》，官方頻道累積超過 42 萬觀看。
works.desc_en: Directed the Google Play Taiwan brand campaign "So Close," which has drawn over 420K views on the official YouTube channel.
works.concept_zh: 「差一點」的那種心情，用三種鏡頭輪流講：貼著螢幕的第一人稱手指、一群人圍在手機旁邊的真實表情、還有完全跳出手機、直接放遊戲自己過場特效的畫面。這份焦慮不是綁在某一款遊戲上，而是跨了好幾款不同的手遊；把它們串起來的不是劇情，是一組不管你玩哪款都能用的點數。兩張素人的臉也是慢慢長出來的——先混在圍觀人群裡當一般玩家，中段換上電競打扮，最後才站到霓虹招牌下對著鏡頭喊話。這個一路升格的過程，本身就是這支片的故事。
works.concept_en: That "so close" feeling is told through three kinds of shots, taken in turns: a first-person thumb pressed against the screen, a group of real faces huddled around a phone, and moments that leave the phone behind entirely and just play the game's own cutscene effects. The anxiety isn't tied to one game — it spans several different titles, and what strings them together isn't a plot, it's one point system that works no matter which game you're playing. The two everyday faces grow into the film too: they start as regular players in the watching crowd, switch to an esports look mid-way, and only at the end step under the neon sign to talk straight to camera. That climb from bystander to host is the story.

works.views_note_en: Director's cut from the channel archive
works.desc_zh: 為國際巧克力品牌 GODIVA 執導的品牌影片。
works.desc_en: A brand film directed for international chocolate label GODIVA.
works.concept_zh: 這支把一份禮物放大到整座城市的尺度：一串 GODIVA 巧克力串成一件巨大的聖誕吊飾，直接懸在地標塔樓的正上方，開場那道劃過夜空的金色流光，只是為了把它揭出來。接著用低多邊形的金色馴鹿和比利時老城的金線剪影，交代品牌從哪裡來；再用寫實的產品攝影，交代哪些是你真的能帶回家的。全片沒有一張人臉，唯一出場的角色，就是品牌自己的馬車標誌。
works.concept_en: This one scales a gift up to the size of a whole city: a string of GODIVA chocolates built into one giant Christmas ornament, hung directly above a landmark tower — and the streak of gold light crossing the night sky at the open is just there to unveil it. Then low-poly gold reindeer and a gilded outline of old Belgian rowhouses tell you where the brand comes from, and straight product photography tells you which parts you can actually take home. Not one human face appears; the only character on screen is the brand's own horse-and-carriage crest.

works.views_note: 頻道 Shorts 三部曲(壹/貳/參之型),此為壹之型
works.views_note_en: Part 1 of a three-part Shorts series on the director's channel
works.desc_zh: 為王品集團新餐飲品牌「肉次方」執導的品牌廣告。
works.desc_en: A brand commercial directed for Wang Steak Group's new dining concept, Rou Ci Fang.
works.concept_zh: 開場先把一整塊油花牛肉供在紅光武館長廊的正中央，像一件要被朝拜的聖物，然後才真的開打——師徒過招、全身纏著雷電，每一段都用紅霧字卡報出招式名，像「壹之型・口感の奧義・肉紋逆切」。全片唯一「真的」的畫面，是刀刃劃開油花的超微距鏡頭；它一遍遍插進來，像一首歌的副歌，打斷每一段武打，把「肉夠不夠嫩」講成一門要修煉的功夫。兩個人打到一半四目相對，滿畫面愛心飄出來，又把武俠的殺氣和吃到飽的輕鬆，揉進同一個鏡頭裡。
works.concept_en: It opens by enshrining a whole marbled cut of beef at the center of a red-lit dojo hallway, like a relic to be worshipped, and only then does the fighting start — master and disciple trading blows, lightning wrapped around them, each round announced on a red-mist card with a move name like "Form One: the Profound Meaning of Texture, the Grain Cuts Back." The only "real" image in the whole film is a hyper-close macro of a blade opening the marbling; it keeps cutting back in like a song's chorus, breaking up every fight and turning "is the meat tender enough" into a kung-fu skill you have to train for. Halfway through a fight the two lock eyes and hearts flood the frame — putting wuxia's menace and an all-you-can-eat buffet's easy mood in the same shot.

works.views_note: 原配對誤植為競品版本（林志穎、坤達、鳳小岳三人合演的官方TVC，108萬觀看，非本案）。已依鄭又勛導演作品頻道 cX7d8eiJfz8 說明欄核實：導演鄭又勛／代言人林志穎（僅一人）；查無對應的官方高觀看版本，故觀看數不顯示，available on request
works.views_note_en: The original pairing mislabeled a competing version (an official TVC co-starring Jimmy Lin, Kunda, and Rhydian Vaughan, 1.08M views — not this case). Verified via York Cheng's director channel description for cX7d8eiJfz8: director York Cheng, single endorser Jimmy Lin only; no matching high-view official version was found, so the view count is not shown — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為經典武俠 IP《天龍八部2》執導廣告，由林志穎代言（依導演頻道說明欄核實，非坊間流傳的三人版）。
works.desc_en: Directed the commercial for classic wuxia IP Tian Long Ba Bu 2, featuring endorser Jimmy Lin (verified via the director's own channel description; not the widely-circulated three-endorser cut).
works.concept_zh: 這支開場就用三個排比句，把「執念」拆成三種代價，直接丟給觀眾：當上萬人之上，你卻要一個人走；打下整個天下，你卻要放手所愛；結拜了兄弟，又躲不過江湖的凶險。段譽走過的每一片雪原、每一叢蘆葦，都是這幾句問話的實景。三問問完，他在風雪裡把三杯血酒一口喝下，敬死去的兄弟。最後答案沒有落在權力或愛情上，落在最樸素的一句字卡——「也永遠兄弟齊心」。
works.concept_en: It opens by splitting "obsession" into three costs with three parallel lines, thrown straight at you: rise above ten thousand others, and you walk alone; conquer the whole world, and you let the one you love go; swear brotherhood, and you still can't dodge the dangers of the jianghu. Every snowfield and reed bed Duan Yu crosses is one of those lines made into a real place. After the three questions, he drinks three cups of wine down in the blizzard for his fallen brothers. The answer doesn't land on power or love — it lands on the plainest caption of all: "we are still a unity."

works.title_en: Soul Land: World of Soul Hunters
works.client_en: Soul Land: World of Soul Hunters
works.views_note: 原配對為官方頻道無代言人的通用 PV（l6HfuzRfLO0，36.6萬觀看），與導演頻道實際案件（高燃集結篇/斗羅時空篇，代言人：汪東城、辰亦儒、曾沛慈、張皓明）不符。已改用官方頻道同代言人陣容版本（終極一班跨時空集結篇，20.8萬觀看），與導演頻道說明欄代言人確認一致
works.views_note_en: The original match was a generic official-channel PV with no endorsers (l6HfuzRfLO0, 366K views), which didn't match the director channel's actual case (endorsers Jiro Wang, Calvin Chen, Pets Tseng, and Chang Hao-Ming). Replaced with the official-channel version featuring the same endorser lineup (208K views), consistent with the endorsers confirmed in the director channel's description
works.desc_zh: 為知名 IP《斗羅大陸：獵魂世界》執導代言廣告，找回終極一班班底汪東城、辰亦儒、曾沛慈、張皓明重返校園場景，以「宗門集結」的召喚敘事貫穿全片。
works.desc_en: Directed the endorsement campaign for the major game IP Soul Land: World of Soul Hunters, reuniting KO ONE cast members Jiro Wang, Calvin Chen, Pets Tseng, and Chang Hao-Ming in their old school setting, built around a "Sect Assembly" call-to-arms.
works.concept_zh: 這支沒有給角色敘舊的時間——魂獸從背後撲上來的那一刻，熟悉的校園走廊就已經是戰場了。四位演員各自被一種顏色的特效纏上身：紫色雷電、金色光環、火焰羽翼，校園實景和 CG 武魂被剪進同一顆鏡頭裡，一起爆開。一句「這就是終極斗羅」，把遊戲裡的等級稱號，直接接到他們一起演了很多年的兄弟身分上。收尾是四個人並肩走向鏡頭。
works.concept_en: This one gives the characters no time to catch up — the second a soul beast lunges from behind, the familiar school corridor is already a battlefield. Each of the four actors gets wrapped in a different color of effect: purple lightning, a gold ring, flaming wings, real hallway and CG martial soul cut into the same shot and going off together. One line, "this is the Ultimate Dou Luo," hooks the game's rank title straight onto the brotherhood these four have played together for years. It closes on all four walking toward camera side by side.

works.views_note: 越南代理商官方頻道查無公開版本，僅導演個人頻道存檔（個位數觀看），available on request
works.views_note_en: No public version found on the Vietnamese publisher's official channel; only archived on the director's personal channel (single-digit views) — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為手遊《開天》執導廣告，由林志穎代言，以雲海仙山的意象扣回「開天」的世界觀命題。
works.desc_en: Directed advertising for the mobile game Kaitian (Heaven's Gate), featuring endorser Jimmy Lin, framed around a sea-of-clouds mountaintop vision that echoes the game's own origin-myth premise.
works.concept_zh: 一句「若世上萬火盡滅」，牽出三段記憶：床帳裡守著熟睡孩子的一隻手、竹林裡陽光下第一次對上的眼神、三個人並肩扛住一道天雷的瞬間。童年、初戀、結義，被剪成同一種想念。直到旁白說出全片真正的重點：「我以此劍，開闢天地。」到這裡，「開天」就不再只是一個片名，它是最後一個動作。
works.concept_en: A single line — "what if every fire in the world went out" — pulls up three memories: a hand watching over a sleeping child behind bed curtains, a first meeting of eyes in the sunlight of a bamboo grove, and three figures bracing side by side under a bolt of lightning. Childhood, first love, brotherhood, all cut into the same kind of longing. Then the voiceover says what the film is really about: "with this sword, I carve open heaven and earth." At that point "Opening Heaven" stops being just a title — it's the final action.

works.views_note: 鄭又勛導演作品頻道存檔版（說明欄核實代言人：徐若瑄），available on request
works.views_note_en: Archived on York Cheng's director channel (endorser confirmed via video description: Vivian Hsu) — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為手遊《神魔傳說》執導廣告，由徐若瑄代言。
works.desc_en: Directed advertising for the mobile game Shen Mo Chuan Shuo, featuring endorser Vivian Hsu.
works.concept_zh: 代言人在這支不是片尾掛的一張名牌，而是一整條角色線走到的終點。一個活了千年的黑袍女子，從戰場上活下來，到獨自站在屍堆裡快要哭出來，再到綠色靈氣纏上全身、妝容變得妖冶——「那就和我一起成魔」是全片唯一的轉折，也是她從人變成神魔的那一刻。片尾那張具名徐若瑄的肖像，就是這個黑化的終點本身。
works.concept_en: Here the endorsement isn't a name tag stuck on the last frame — it's where a whole character arc ends up. A woman who has lived a thousand years goes from surviving a battle, to standing alone in a field of the dead on the edge of tears, to green spectral energy wrapping her body as her look turns ornate and menacing — "then let it transform me into a demon" is the film's one turn, and the moment she stops being human. The portrait credited to Vivian Hsu at the end is that turn itself.

works.views_note: 鄭又勛導演作品頻道存檔版（說明欄核實代言人：林心如），available on request
works.views_note_en: Archived on York Cheng's director channel (endorser confirmed via video description: Ruby Lin) — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為手遊《超爆三國志》執導廣告，由林心如代言。
works.desc_en: Directed advertising for the mobile game Chao Bao San Guo Zhi, featuring endorser Ruby Lin.
works.concept_zh: 她先以本人的樣子出現——黑色亮片、長髮迎風——下一個鏡頭就已經站在建安十三年的赤壁戰火裡。一隻披甲的手碰上額頭，像在喚醒一段被忘掉的前世。她同時是螢幕外的代言人，也是螢幕裡被喚醒的那個人。所以「沉寂千年的火鳳」不是一句形容詞，是她身分被揭開的那一刻。
works.concept_en: She first shows up as herself — black sequins, hair streaming in the wind — and the very next shot drops her into the fires of Red Cliffs in the thirteenth year of Jian'an. An armored hand touches a forehead, as if waking a past life that had been forgotten. She's the endorser standing outside the screen and the woman being woken up inside it, at the same time. So "the fire phoenix that has slept a thousand years" isn't a description — it's the moment her identity is revealed.

works.views_note: 鄭又勛導演作品頻道存檔版（說明欄核實代言人：吳宗憲），available on request
works.views_note_en: Archived on York Cheng's director channel (endorser confirmed via video description: Jacky Wu) — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為策略手遊《文明與征服》（官方英文名 Era of Conquest）執導廣告，由吳宗憲代言。
works.desc_en: Directed advertising for the strategy mobile game Era of Conquest (文明與征服), featuring endorser Jacky Wu.
works.concept_zh: 這支不借代言人的光環，借的是他插科打諢的本能。一句「我當盟主 有誰不服」撂下去，先是一個角鬥士打扮的壯漢衝上來，接著羅馬皇帝連喊三聲「我不服」，才輪到他拔劍。畫面直接疊上一句英文「SHUT UP」，把一場多方互嗆的鬧劇，壓成幾秒鐘的喜劇節奏。遊戲的名字是他自己唸出來的，像連台詞都懶得裝成是別人寫的。
works.concept_en: This one doesn't borrow the star's aura — it borrows his instinct for a gag. He throws down "I'm the alliance leader, who refuses to submit," and first a muscular gladiator charges in, then a Roman emperor shouts "I don't submit" three times, before he even draws his sword. The screen slaps up an English "SHUT UP," squeezing a multi-way shouting match into a few seconds of comic timing. He says the game's name himself — as if the line couldn't even be bothered to sound like someone else wrote it.

works.views_note: 鄭又勛導演作品頻道存檔版（金庸正版授權手遊，說明欄核實代言人：徐錦江），available on request
works.views_note_en: Archived on York Cheng's director channel (an officially Louis Cha-licensed mobile game; endorser confirmed via video description: Elvis Tsui) — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為金庸正版授權手遊《新鹿鼎記》執導電視廣告，由徐錦江代言。
works.desc_en: Directed a TVC for the officially Louis Cha-licensed mobile game Xin Lu Ding Ji, featuring endorser Elvis Tsui.
works.concept_zh: 這支沒有把徐錦江的招牌反派翻過來用，是順著它加碼：鰲拜還是那個跋扈的鰲拜，只是他貪的東西從權力換成了美人和角色。建寧公主一句「用你最厲害的那招」點著他，雙胞胎姊妹接著說「兩個也不夠」，把他的胃口一路推到「我全部都要」。尾卡老老實實打上「鰲拜」兩個字，提醒你這張臉從來不用假裝成別人。
works.concept_en: This one doesn't flip Xu Jinjiang's signature villain — it doubles down on it. Oboi is still the same domineering Oboi, he's just been redirected: from political power to beauties and collectible characters. Princess Jianning lights him up with "use your most powerful move," the twin sisters follow with "two isn't enough," pushing his appetite all the way to "I want them ALL." The end card names him plainly — Oboi — reminding you this face never has to pretend to be anyone else.

works.views_note: 鄭又勛導演作品頻道存檔版_完整版（說明欄核實代言人：Selina任家萱、任容萱姊妹），available on request
works.views_note_en: Archived on York Cheng's director channel, full cut (endorsers confirmed via video description: sisters Selina Jen and Lorene Jen) — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為手遊《新仙俠：起源》執導廣告，由 Selina 任家萱與任容萱姊妹代言。
works.desc_en: Directed advertising for the mobile game Xin Xianxia: Qiyuan, featuring sisters Selina Jen and Lorene Jen.
works.concept_zh: 這支把兩條時間線縫進同一首歌：現代的臥房裡，兩個孩子同床蓋被、互相安慰；古裝的世界裡，她們的化身在燭光前梳頭、在洞穴裡鄭重交換信物。兩邊反覆疊在一起，疊到你分不清誰是誰的前世。長大以後的兩姊妹，一個還穿著古裝、一個已經是現代打扮，並肩站著相視而笑——這份感情本來就跨著兩個時空，不需要翻成同一種樣子。
works.concept_en: This film stitches two timelines into one song: in a present-day bedroom, two children share a bed under a blanket, comforting each other; in the period world, their counterparts brush their hair by candlelight and solemnly trade a keepsake in a cave. The two keep layering over each other until you can't tell whose past life is whose. Grown up, the two sisters stand side by side — one still in ancient robes, one in modern dress — smiling at each other. This bond was always built across two timelines; it never needed to be translated into one.

works.views_note: 鄭又勛導演作品頻道存檔版（說明欄核實代言人：陳漢典），available on request
works.views_note_en: Archived on York Cheng's director channel (endorser confirmed via video description: Hank Chen) — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為手遊《斬妖》執導事前預約廣告，由陳漢典代言。
works.desc_en: Directed a pre-registration campaign ad for the mobile game Zhan Yao, featuring endorser Hank Chen.
works.concept_zh: 這支的笑點，是一個更狠的諧音哏：陳漢典演的「空虛公子」，拿著一把寫著「空虛」的扇子自封天下第一，下一秒就被身旁的婢女當眾拆穿——「你不是空虛，是腎虛。」整支片的笑就架在這一個尷尬的諧音上，不是靠角色多浮誇。同一個哏還被延伸成一整首歌：彩色的荒誕喜劇（輪椅、壽宴配喪禮、打不通的電話）和顆粒感的黑白復古片段交錯剪，副歌一遍遍唱著「腎虛空虛」，直到片尾才揭曉真正的聯動——一個諧音哏，養出了一整個自嘲的小宇宙。
works.concept_en: The joke here is a nastier pun than it looks: Aaron Chen plays "Young Master Void," fanning himself with a placard that reads "Void" and declaring himself number one under heaven — only to get publicly deflated a beat later by a maidservant: "You're not Void, you're Kidney-Deficient." The whole film rests on that one awkward homophone, not on how over-the-top the character is. The same gag gets stretched into a full song: color-graded absurd comedy (a wheelchair, a birthday party crossed with a funeral, a call no one picks up) intercut with grainy black-and-white retro segments, the chorus looping "kidney-void, empty-void," until the ending finally reveals a real crossover — one pun, grown into a whole self-mocking little universe.

works.views_note: 鄭又勛導演作品頻道存檔版（說明欄核實代言人：李多慧；另有張衛健代言版本，非本支），available on request
works.views_note_en: Archived on York Cheng's director channel (endorser confirmed via video description: Lee Da-hye; a separate cut featured Dicky Cheung, not this one) — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為手遊《玩賺大都會》執導廣告，由李多慧代言（另有張衛健代言版本）。
works.desc_en: Directed advertising for the mobile game Wan Zhuan Da Du Hui, featuring endorser Lee Da-hye (a separate cut featured Dicky Cheung).
works.concept_zh: 開場先把她的三個分身平放在沙灘上做比較，像在陳列商品；下一秒，其中一個已經放大成城市天際線上一整棟大樓的看板。看板開始朝現實下起鈔票雨，她乾脆從螢幕裡走出來，站在街頭一張一張數錢。這支把「代言人」直接翻成一場城市尺度的造星奇觀，誇張到自己都在笑自己。
works.concept_en: It opens by laying her three personas out flat on the beach for comparison, like products on display; a beat later, one of them has blown up into a building-sized billboard on the city skyline. The billboard starts raining cash down into the real world, and she just steps out of the screen, standing on the street counting the bills one by one. This one translates "the endorser" straight into a city-scale spectacle of overnight stardom — so over-the-top it's laughing at itself.

works.views_note: 本篇單支影片 10.2萬觀看；同系列「震撼登場」全 8 支官方影片合計超過 290 萬觀看
works.views_note_en: This single cut has drawn 102K views; the full "Shocking Debut" series of 8 official videos has drawn a combined 2.9M+ views
works.desc_zh: 為國際大作《失落的方舟》（Amazon Games）執導廣告，官方系列影片合計觀看數超過 290 萬。
works.desc_en: Directed advertising for the major title Lost Ark (Amazon Games); the official campaign series has drawn a combined 2.9M+ views.
works.concept_zh: 這支沒有一張臉可以靠，全靠氣氛說服你。斗篷身影從灰霧裡慢慢浮出來，伸手碰到一圈血色光暈的那一刻，字卡寫著「體內潛藏著無法抑制的力量」——墮落被拍成一個緩慢又確定的動作，不需要台詞收尾。最後鏡頭俯瞰一整片焦土，片名自己浮出來，成了整支片最後、也是唯一的一記鉤子。
works.concept_en: This one has no face to lean on — it convinces you entirely through mood. A cloaked figure rises slowly out of gray mist, and the instant a hand touches a ring of blood-red light, the caption reads "an uncontrollable power lurks within" — the fall is shot as one slow, certain gesture, with no line needed to close it. The camera pulls back over a whole field of scorched earth, and the title surfaces on its own, becoming the film's last and only hook.

_removed_works.title_zh: RO仙境傳說：初心之戰《律師篇》
_removed_works.client: RO 仙境傳說：初心之戰
_removed_works.views_note: 原配對案名誤植為「曙光」，鄭又勛導演作品頻道實際收錄的是《RO仙境傳說：初心之戰》（醫師篇/教授篇/律師篇三支），查無「曙光」。已改為官方頻道（GRAVITY COMMUNICATIONS）同案「律師篇_15秒」版本，與導演頻道律師篇（9uJV8x3Foq4，導演:鄭又勛）標題一致確認
_removed_works.views_note_en: The original pairing mislabeled the case as "Dawn"; the director's own channel actually lists Ragnarok Online: The First Fight ("Doctor"/"Professor"/"Lawyer" cuts) with no "Dawn" entry. Replaced with the official channel's (GRAVITY COMMUNICATIONS) "Lawyer_15s" cut of the same case, confirmed consistent with the "Lawyer" cut on the director's channel (9uJV8x3Foq4, director: York Cheng)
_removed_works.desc_zh: 為經典大型 IP《仙境傳說：初心之戰》執導廣告（律師篇），官方頻道累積超過 28 萬觀看。
_removed_works.desc_en: Directed an ad ("Lawyer" cut) for the classic large-scale IP Ragnarok Online: The First Fight, drawing 280K+ views on its official channel.
_removed_works._removed_reason: 2026-07-19 York 拍板終版名單：品牌主軸+遊戲輔軸 16 部，此案不在遊戲輔軸 11 部之列
